title: lobelia ericetorum
intro: Lobelia ericetorum, also known as northern lobelia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Lobelia ericetorum include its ability to ease coughs, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, Lobelia ericetorum is often dried and used in teas, tinctures, and infusions to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
